channel.title: Michael on Bluesky
channel.description: Born Again Christian who loves technology. Wondering when I will get every electronic device I want.

item.title:
Political Disillusionment
[ALERT:warning] Political Rant [/...
item.description:
Political Disillusionment

[ALERT:warning] Political Rant [/ALERT] Okay, this is one of the few politically related posts I make each year because politics are so divisive. So here’s your warning: if you’d rather not read polit

Okay this is one of a few political related posts I …

item.title: Today’s the perfect reminder that home is where the heart is...
item.description:
Today’s the perfect reminder that home is where the heart is — and my heart’s in Florida. #FloridaStatehoodDay

#FloridaStatehoodDay #History #FloridaHistory 🌴🏛️🎉

item.title: 😊Had a super productive weekend working on the Plex server a...
item.description: 😊Had a super productive weekend working on the Plex server and my personal apps with Claude and OpenAI 💻. #selfhosting

item.title: Price hike alert! My Hetzner server jumped from $17.99 to $2...
item.description: Price hike alert! My Hetzner server jumped from $17.99 to $24.99 due to rising RAM and SSD costs 💸. A 39% increase on a running server stings 😬. Supply shortages hit hard. Expect blog and website hosting prices to rise next 👀. #selfhosting

item.title: I’ve deleted my Discord server, account, and apps. Now hunti...
item.description:
I’ve deleted my Discord server, account, and apps. Now hunting for a simple voice chat replacement 🎧. Considering Teamspeak for gaming 🎮 or maybe a self-hosted option. Didn’t use all Discord’s features and didn’t like its direction. Definitely time for a change!
#Selfhosting #Discorddiscontent

item.title: Long day! Up at 4 AM ⏰, work by 6 💼, then a dermatologist vi...
item.description: Long day! Up at 4 AM ⏰, work by 6 💼, then a dermatologist visit for my yearly skin check 🩺. All good except a minor issue that needs a prescription 💊. Super productive but totally wiped out 😴. Early bedtime for me tonight! 🌙✨

item.title: Is AI killing technology? www.computerworld.com/article/4134...
item.description:
Is AI killing technology?
www.computerworld.com/article/4134...

Is AI killing technology?
It sure feels that way. Here are all the ways the generative AI boom is suffocating everything.

item.title:
I agree with the Grandson! 👏
Grandson of the inventor of Re...
item.description:
I agree with the Grandson! 👏

Grandson of the inventor of Reese's Peanut Butter Cups accuses Hershey of cutting corners .

finance.yahoo.com/news/grandso...

Grandson of the inventor of Reese's Peanut Butter Cups accuses Hershey of cutting corners
The grandson of the inventor of Reese’s Peanut Butter Cups has lashed out at The Hershey Co., accusing the candy company of hurting the Reese's brand by shifting to cheaper ingredients in many product...

item.title: 🎉 Update: My @mitchelltribe.com account is back! Don't know ...
item.description: 🎉 Update: My @mitchelltribe.com account is back! Don't know who fixed it or how, but shortly after my post it started working again. Thank you to whoever at @bsky.app quietly resolved this! The power of a well-placed hashtag. 😄 #BlueskySupport #ATProto

item.title: Here’s to the leaders who remind us that progress is possibl...
item.description: Here’s to the leaders who remind us that progress is possible! Enjoy . #PresidentsDay #USHistory 🇺🇸🎖️🦅

item.title: Finally fixed a major annoyance 😤! Replaced the gas cylinder...
item.description: Finally fixed a major annoyance 😤! Replaced the gas cylinder in my 5-year-old Secretlabs Titan chair 🪑. Just need to swap the armrest now and hope to get 2-3 more years out of it 👍. Small fix, big relief! #Secretlab #OfficeChair #DIYFix

item.title:
Better Health, Bigger To-Do List
I haven't blogged lately f...
item.description:
Better Health, Bigger To-Do List

I haven't blogged lately for several reasons. I have been feeling much better from my Obstructive Hypertrophic Cardiomyopathy (I have blogged extensively about it in several past posts). I will ju

https://mitchelltribe.com/2026/02/15/better-health-bigger-todo-list/

item.title: 🚨 New account alert! My @mitchelltribe.com has been locked o...
item.description:
🚨 New account alert! My @mitchelltribe.com has been locked out since January due to a "jwt signature does not match jwt issuer" problem in the app (API works). Nearly a month of silence from @bsky.app support. Now self-hosting. Please update your follows! 💪
#BlueskySupport #ATProto #SelfHosting...
